name: fs.read
description: read file contents with an optional line range
underlying: workspace fs read, or task:fs read when a branch is resolved

name: fs.search
description: search files with ripgrep through the workspace script
underlying: workspace fs search, or task:fs search when a branch is resolved

name: fs.list
description: list or find files in the repo root or a resolved task worktree
underlying: workspace fs list, or task:fs list when a branch is resolved

name: fs.write
description: write a file in a task worktree

name: fs.patch
description: replace a line range in a task worktree file

name: http
description: make HTTP requests through the workspace http wrapper (wraps xh)

name: fs.trash
description: move a task worktree file to trash

name: task.start
description: create a task branch, worktree, and draft PR

name: task.init
description: write task metadata for an existing worktree

name: task.push
description: push changed task files to the task branch through GitHub API

name: task.pr
description: merge task to stream and create or refresh the stream review PR

name: task.prs
description: show task and review PR links

name: task.merge
description: merge a pull request through the workspace task merge script

name: task.finish
description: finish a task branch after merge

name: task.cleanup
description: preview or remove stale task worktrees and branches

name: task.exec
description: run a command inside a task worktree

name: task.current
description: resolve the current task branch without running a mutating command

name: task.pin
description: pin a task branch for a programmatic workspace client

name: task.ensureSynced
description: check whether the task stream appears synced

name: taskMeta.smoke
description: run the task metadata smoke suite

name: context.search
description: search project memory by content

name: context.find
description: search project memory by title

name: context.get
description: read a full project memory search result

name: context.list
description: list recent project memories

name: context.save
description: save a file or text into project memory

name: context.categories
description: list project memory categories

name: explore
description: run repository exploration retrieval

name: decideNext
description: recommend the next action from evidence state

name: confidenceScore
description: score confidence from evidence state

name: exploit
description: select the highest-confidence editing target

name: confirm
description: run verification or targeted validation through confirm

name: audit
description: audit workspace scripts, docs, or index freshness

name: stream.context
description: show recent stream context

name: stream.list
description: list stream branches

name: stream.sync
description: sync a stream branch with main

name: review.run
description: run the workspace review checks

name: verify
description: run the full task safety gate

name: prReview
description: fetch review comments for a PR

name: aiReview
description: run the AI PR review helper

name: gh
description: run the workspace GitHub helper with an explicit action

name: browser
description: run the generic workspace browser wrapper command

name: browser.open
description: open a URL with the browser wrapper

name: browser.test
description: open a URL, wait for load, snapshot, and screenshot

name: browser.consuelo
description: open consuelo.consuelohq.com with the browser wrapper

name: browser.app
description: open app.consuelohq.com with the browser wrapper

name: browser.screenshot
description: capture a browser screenshot

name: browser.snap
description: capture an accessibility snapshot

name: browser.click
description: click a browser element by ref

name: browser.fill
description: fill a browser input by ref

name: browser.login
description: run a saved browser auth login profile

name: browser.reauth
description: restart the browser daemon and run a saved auth login profile

name: browser.eval
description: execute JavaScript on the current browser page

name: browser.raw
description: pass raw arguments through to agent-browser

name: browser.close
description: close active browser sessions

name: sentry.config
description: show Sentry API configuration status from Keychain without exposing secrets

name: sentry.projects
description: list Sentry projects for the configured organization

name: sentry.issues
description: search Sentry issues across the configured organization

name: sentry.issue
description: retrieve one Sentry issue by short id or numeric issue id

name: sentry.issueEvent
description: retrieve a latest, recommended, oldest, or concrete Sentry event for an issue

name: sentry.event
description: retrieve or resolve a Sentry event id, using a project slug when available

name: sentry.trace
description: perform a best-effort Sentry trace lookup across organization events and issues

name: wait
description: sleep or wait for a PR/deploy

name: tmp
description: run the workspace temp-file helper

name: railway.logs
description: read Railway deploy/runtime logs through the workspace script

name: railway.redeploy
description: trigger a Railway redeploy

name: website.deploy
description: deploy the Consuelo website

name: doctor
description: run workspace diagnostics

name: status
description: show compact workspace status

name: server
description: manage the workspace MCP server

name: checkFiles
description: run syntax checks over a set of files through task:exec

name: editFlow
description: run a search-read-patch-verify flow as a composed script

name: mac.exec
description: run a non-repo shell command on the Mac

name: mac.read
description: read a non-repo file on the Mac

name: mac.write
description: write a non-repo file on the Mac

name: mac.search
description: search non-repo files on the Mac

name: mac.list
description: list non-repo files on the Mac

name: mac.process
description: list or kill local Mac processes

name: mac.port
description: check or find a local port

name: generate.docs
description: generate TOOLS.md from the tool manifest

name: generate.types
description: generate workspace.d.ts from the tool manifest

name: consueloDesign.run
description: start Open Design daemon and web UI in the foreground through the Bun facade

name: consueloDesign.getDesignSystem
description: return base Consuelo DESIGN.md and consuelo-design AGENTS.md only

name: consueloDesign.listSkills
description: list upstream Open Design skills and Consuelo workflow mappings

name: consueloDesign.listDesignSystems
description: list Consuelo default design system and upstream reference systems

name: consueloDesign.upstreamStatus
description: show vendored Open Design metadata and runtime requirements

name: consueloDesign.railwayCheck
description: verify consuelo-design is excluded from Railway deploy paths

name: consueloDesign.check
description: run consuelo-design package boundary and Railway checks

name: consueloDesign.generateWebsite
description: start or open a live Open Design website working session

name: consueloDesign.generateDemo
description: start or open a live Open Design demo working session

name: consueloDesign.generateImageBrief
description: start or open a live Open Design image/media working session

name: consueloDesign.generateDigitalEguide
description: start or open a live Open Design digital e-guide working session

name: consueloDesign.generateEmail
description: start or open a live Open Design email working session

name: consueloDesign.generateMotionFrame
description: start or open a live Open Design motion-frame working session

name: consueloDesign.renderHyperframes
description: start or open a live Open Design HyperFrames render working session

name: consueloDesign.uiBg
description: start Open Design managed runtimes in the background through the Bun facade

name: consueloDesign.uiStop
description: stop Open Design managed runtimes through the Bun facade

name: consueloDesign.uiStatus
description: show Open Design managed runtime status through the Bun facade

name: consueloDesign.uiLogs
description: show Open Design managed runtime logs through the Bun facade

name: consueloDesign.odBuild
description: build the vendored Open Design daemon CLI through the Bun facade
